name: Greek Yogurt Ranch Sauce

ingredients.item: cup (80 ml) strained fresh lemon juice
Scant 1 tablespoon Dijon or Greek mustard
cup (80 ml) Greek yogurt, preferably full-fat
chopped fresh herbs of your choice, such as dill, parsley, oregano, and/or mint
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
Put the lemon juice in a medium bowl and whisk in the mustard.
While whisking, drizzle in the olive oil in a slow, steady stream and whisk until the mixture emulsifies. Whisk in the yogurt until smooth, followed by the garlic and herbs.
Season to taste with salt and pepper. Use immediately or place in a jar with a tight-fitting lid and refrigerate for up to 3 days.
